flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Coastal Pines Technical College rose 19% between 2021 and 2024 ($4.9k → $5.8k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Coastal Pines Technical College rose 18% between 2021 and 2024 ($2.8k → $3.3k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Coastal Pines Technical College fell 14% between 2021 and 2024 (1.9k → 1.6k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Coastal Pines Technical College rose 25% between 2021 and 2024 (52.9% → 66.3%).
